caption: A shirtless man with sunglasses and a mustache smiles at the camera while wearing black underwear with white lettering, being held from behind by another man also wearing sunglasses.
A close-up of a weathered stone sculpture depicting the smooth, curved contours of a human torso and shoulder, with a partially visible winged figure in the background.
A man wearing a bowler hat and glasses sits in a wooden room, talking on a vintage telephone while sunlight streams in and illuminates a white helmet resting on a wooden shelf behind him.
A man wearing a beige cap and a woman are kneeling beside an open appliance, with the man holding a filter and the woman gesturing as if explaining something to him.
A black-and-white close-up portrait of an elderly man with deep wrinkles, intense eyes, and a full white beard, looking directly at the camera.
A white Porsche 911 classic car with racing decals and the website "www.fincassantacreu.com" on the windshield is driving on a winding road with a rocky hillside and guardrail in the background.
A person in a black top and white shorts is bent over, arranging colorful rainbow beads on a stand while another person in an orange shirt and denim shorts stands nearby.

A person in a Wonder Woman cosplay bends over, revealing a red top, blue shorts with a white star, gold chain, and brown leather accessories, while a "GEN CON" lanyard hangs around their neck in a convention setting.
Two shirtless men in leather harnesses are playfully embracing and kissing in a crowded outdoor setting, with one man carrying the other piggyback-style.
A small gray and black dog with a red leash stands on a tiled floor next to a black table in an indoor setting.
A person in a swim cap and bikini is seated cross-legged on a white platform in a room with red and teal geometric framing, presented in an anaglyph 3D effect.
A woman with a large, curly blonde afro and colorful accessories smiles while looking toward the camera, standing in front of a window that reflects a vibrant pink neon sign shaped like a figure.
A person wearing tight black leather pants with lacing and thigh-high boots stands with their back to the camera, facing an audience in what appears to be an indoor venue.

A muscular man with a shaved head, wearing a Batman-themed necklace and a utility belt, is pulling open his shirt to reveal a Batman logo on his chest, set against a dark, snowy backdrop with a large, glowing Batman symbol in the sky.

A woman stands in a modern room with large windows overlooking water, beside a sofa where a classical painting of a reclining figure appears to be holding a wine glass, with a bottle of champagne and a crate on a wooden table nearby.

Several women in revealing outfits, including bikinis and leather-like tops and bottoms, are posing and walking in what appears to be an indoor event or exhibition, with green plants in the foreground.
A young woman in a floral-patterned kimono with obi sash and matching hair ornaments smiles while standing indoors near a closed door, holding a small handbag.
A person is sitting on a patterned bed, wearing a black tank top, a plaid skirt with a brown belt, and black flip-flops, while holding a phone and taking a selfie.

A woman with long blonde hair and bangs, wearing a white sleeveless top with a patterned side and blue leggings, poses outdoors with one hand near her neck and the other gripping the bottom of her top, set against a backdrop of trees and bright sunlight.

A shirtless man with long dark hair is seen from behind on a dimly lit stage, wearing black pants with a visible belt that reads "ROXER JOHN", while other band members play instruments in the background.
A black, glossy, headless sculpture of a female torso and legs, standing on a pedestal against a plain wall with a distinct shadow cast to the right.
A close-up profile of a person's face showing a blue eye, long lashes, and freckles scattered across the nose and cheek.
A woman with pink hair and a tattooed leg leans over a table with her hands on her cheeks, while another woman in a black hoodie stands behind her in what appears to be a convention or event space.
A woman with long pink hair stands against a plain wall, wearing a matching pink and white two-piece outfit with a tropical leaf print, her eyes closed and hand resting on her thigh.
A pregnant woman with blonde hair, wearing a white crocheted, fringed top, sits against a white wall with a red and white checkered curtain behind her, gently holding her belly.
A man with tattoos plays a bass guitar on stage while a microphone is positioned in front of him, and several women stand nearby watching.

A soldier in camouflage gear, wearing protective goggles and kneeling on the ground, uses a tool to work on a yellow circular cover while another soldier stands nearby, with a red fire extinguisher in the foreground and trees in the background under a clear blue sky.
A person is partially illuminated by strong sunlight casting sharp shadows, with their face and upper body in silhouette against a bright window.
A performer with long dark hair and a dark velvet jacket stands at a microphone on a dimly lit stage, facing an audience in a smoky venue.
A nude woman reclines on a draped chaise lounge while a Black woman in a floral-patterned dress sits beside her, holding a bouquet of flowers.
A shirtless person with their back to the camera, arms raised and hands touching above their head, standing in a forest with autumn foliage and dappled sunlight filtering through the trees.
Two women stand indoors, one holding a handwritten sign that reads "FREAK" and pointing at it, while the other looks on.
A smiling woman in a red shirt and jeans holds a clear, dome-shaped object and a flip phone, with a blue lanyard around her neck.
A woman in a red and white striped shirt and black cardigan walks down a paved street, holding a cigarette, with market stalls and a multi-story building in the background.
An elderly man wearing a dark coat walks a small white dog on a leash across a cobblestone street in a black and white photograph.
A woman with curly brown hair and red lipstick smiles while wearing a red V-neck top, standing against a textured white wall with dramatic lighting casting a shadow to her left.
Inside a cozy, wood-paneled pub with green leather seating, patrons are gathered around a bar and tables, with framed pictures and a mirror adorning the walls and a window letting in natural light.
A female pilot in a green flight suit and headscarf stands beside an open cockpit of a military jet, with another aircraft displaying a Pakistani flag and markings visible in the background.

A person with dark hair and red lipstick stands on a rooftop balcony wearing a red satin lingerie set with lace trim, hands resting on the railing, with brick buildings and tiled roofs visible in the background.
A charcoal sketch depicts a reclining nude figure with a serene, closed-eyed expression, rendered with loose, expressive lines and soft shading on aged paper, framed with a simple white border.

A woman with dark, windswept hair stands outdoors in a red-and-white bow-patterned dress, accessorized with a layered necklace and dangling earrings, while holding a black bag over her shoulder against a blurred green background.

This is a concert ticket for Dar Williams plus Jim Lauderdale, dated Tuesday, 31 May 2016 at 20:00, for a standard seat in Stalls C7 at the Exeter Phoenix, with a barcode and contact information on the left side.
A person is lying on a bed with their legs extended and slightly bent at the knees, wearing a blue garment that covers the upper thighs, with white sheets and a brown bed frame visible.

In a laboratory setting, a person in a white lab coat and face mask is handling test tubes while another person in similar attire observes, with laboratory equipment and shelves visible in the background.
A shirtless man with red hair sits on a chair under an umbrella at a dimly lit outdoor table near palm trees at night.
A stylized painting of a seated, nude female figure with red hair and bold red outlines, set against a background of green, blue, and beige tones.
A woman with blonde hair is lounging on a white chaise lounge under a white canopy with fringe, surrounded by lush greenery and a wooden table with candles and glassware nearby.

A smiling woman in a red top with an "FS1" sticker on her forehead is framed by two men pointing at her, with beer bottles and flowers on a table in front of them at what appears to be a social gathering.
Five women are standing side by side outdoors, each wearing a different colored loose-fitting dress and various styles of boots, smiling at the camera in front of a metal guardrail.
A family walks past a construction site enclosed by a metal fence, with a woman in the foreground holding a child’s hand, while another girl follows behind, all captured in black and white.
A woman wearing a black niqab with only her eyes visible holds a quilted baby carrier adorned with teddy bear patterns against a weathered wall with faint Arabic writing.
A group of young women are gathered in a cozy, dimly lit room adorned with "JORDI 16" balloons and colorful party balloons, with one woman standing by a pool table and others socializing nearby.

A diverse group of people, mostly women, pose together in front of a red curtain, dressed in stylish and varied evening outfits, with some wearing bold hair colors and accessories, in what appears to be a social or event setting.

A group of people, mostly women, are gathered closely together at an event, many holding trophies and smiling or looking down at the awards, with a man in a black cap standing among them, against a backdrop of draped curtains and a speaker.
A smiling woman with dark, shoulder-length hair is wearing a black top with vertical silver stripes and sheer sleeves, accessorized with a multi-strand necklace and bracelets while holding a spoon.
A woman with blonde hair in a braid is seen from behind, wearing a black one-piece swimsuit with a deep back cut, illuminated by a glowing light against a dark background.
A woman with long dark hair stands nude against a black background, her arms crossed over her chest, and she looks toward the camera with a slight smirk while wearing several rings and bracelets.

This is a vintage poster advertising "Humoristernas Salong" (The Humorists' Salon), featuring a stylized illustration of a nude woman with a mask and a paintbrush, with text in Swedish and Finnish announcing exhibitions and events at Liberty in Helsinki.
Four smiling people pose together indoors, holding various items including a bottle, a deck of cards, and a small box, with a digital timer displaying "00:00" visible on the wall behind them.
A woman is seated on a bed, wearing a white shirt open over a black bra, with one hand resting near her collarbone.
A close-up portrait of a woman with brown eyes and light brown hair, smiling gently at the camera.
A shirtless man with a beard and mustache lies on his back on a red patterned surface, looking directly at the camera.
Two children, seen from behind, walk into the ocean at the shoreline, their arms extended outward.
A woman in a red dress is lying on a gray couch, propping her head up with her hand while looking towards the camera.
A black-and-white photograph of a nude woman kneeling on a patterned rug, her head tilted and arms raised behind her head, with a decorative lamp and dark backdrop behind her.

A bright yellow, bald, nude female figurine with exaggerated curves, red lips, and black hair, holding a decorative fan in one hand while the other hand is raised, standing on a black base with engraved text, positioned on a wooden surface with a small ceramic village scene visible in the background.

A family of three—two adults and a child—are posing cheerfully behind bars, dressed in black-and-white striped prisoner costumes with matching hats, in what appears to be a themed attraction or museum exhibit.
A person with large golden wings and a futuristic outfit stands in a neon-lit, cyberpunk cityscape with towering buildings adorned with glowing signs and holograms.
A close-up of a painting showing a bare-chested human torso with a wooden arrow embedded in the upper right side, partially covered by red fabric.

A nude woman with dark hair sits on a black metal chair, her legs extended and feet resting on the floor, while another nude figure leans over her, their hands clasped together near her knee, set against a backdrop of a patterned red rug and wooden floor.
A person wearing a blue bodysuit, long blonde wig with twin ponytails, and black strappy heels stands indoors in front of patterned curtains and a window with blinds.
A young girl with dark hair and a polka-dot top smiles while looking away from the camera in a black and white photograph.

In a bathroom with blue and white walls, a person with long hair stands in the doorway with their arms raised, while a woman with glasses dances joyfully near the toilet, both appearing to be having fun, with a green pyramid decoration hanging above them.
A woman with dark hair and black lipstick stands in a forest, leaning against a tree, her arms covered in tattoos, and holding a red cloth over her chest.
A small bronze figurine depicts a nude male figure with a bearded face, wearing a crown and a beard-like headdress, standing with one hand on his hip and the other holding a phallus.

A person stands indoors wearing a white sweater with colorful stars, a blue velvet mini skirt, sheer tights, and white heeled sandals, positioned in front of patterned curtains with a potted plant to the side.
A bronze sculpture of a frog in a dynamic pose, featuring a greenish patina and gold accents on its eyes, nose, and webbed feet.
A woman with long blonde hair and sunglasses is taking a mirror selfie while wearing a pink crop top with a "good girl" design and black leggings.
A woman with bright red hair and glasses, wearing a yellow blouse, sits at a restaurant table with food and drinks in front of her, her hand near her face.
A woman with long black hair, wearing a shiny silver bodysuit and black high-heeled sandals, stands in a room with patterned curtains, a bed, and a potted plant nearby.

A woman dressed as Dorothy from The Wizard of Oz, wearing a blue and white gingham dress with blue bow, sits on a wooden crate in a grassy yard in front of a white house, holding a wicker basket containing a small black dog.

A shirtless man standing in a field of dry grass and shrubs under an overcast sky, with a large circular hole in his torso revealing a reddish interior.

A person's torso and thighs are adorned with a vibrant, colorful tattoo of a peacock, featuring detailed feathers in shades of teal, magenta, and purple, with the bird appearing to spread its wings and tail across the body.
An elderly woman wearing glasses, a white headscarf with a decorative brooch, and a colorful embroidered hat smiles warmly.
A group of young men dressed in yellow Batman costumes with masks are posing together on a busy street, one of them wearing a costume with a fishnet pattern and a white thong.

A person wearing a yellow shirt and denim shorts is seated outdoors, revealing intricate black tattoos on their chest and thigh.

This image is an advertisement for a digital product called "Caramel Skin 4 Make-up" by Namminliz, featuring a 3D rendered female character model shown from front and back in a white bikini, alongside four circular close-ups of her face with different lip colors, all set against a white background decorated with pink lipstick kiss marks.

A person with vibrant blue hair and red lipstick poses in black lingerie against a dark background adorned with red rose petals and string lights.

Four women are gathered around a table indoors, engaged in conversation while seated with food and drinks.

A framed painting depicts two nude figures, a woman holding a staff and a man standing behind her, within an interior space featuring architectural elements like columns and arches, with a small potted plant in a glass vase placed in front of the artwork.
